name: MicaFlow
description: MICA MRI Processing Pipeline BIDS App

inputs.name: BIDS Directory
inputs.description: The directory with the input dataset formatted according to the BIDS standard.

inputs.name: Output Directory
inputs.description: The directory where the output files should be stored.

inputs.name: Analysis Level
inputs.description: Level of the analysis that will be performed.

inputs.name: Participant Label
inputs.description: The label(s) of the participant(s) that should be analyzed.

inputs.name: Session Label
inputs.description: Specific list of sessions to process.

inputs.name: Number of Cores
inputs.description: Number of CPU cores to use per subject.

output-files.name: BIDS Derivatives
output-files.description: Derivatives folders outputted by the pipeline.
